query:
INSERT INTO attraction_guides (name, slug, overview, attractionType, difficulty, published, featured, createdAt, updatedAt) 
VALUES ('Maaya Thila', 'maaya-thila', 'Maaya Thila is one of the most famous dive sites in the Maldives, known for its unique rock formation and abundant marine life.', 'dive', 'intermediate', 1, 0, NOW(), NOW());
